---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill, agent, command, hook, or MCP for the kit
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What coding workflow is harder than it should be today? Who runs into it?

## Proposed addition

One of: skill / agent / command / hook / MCP registry entry / CLI subcommand.

Describe it concretely — name, what it does, when Claude should reach for it.

## Why this earns a slot

Every shipped skill/agent/command/hook/MCP costs startup tokens or latency. Your proposal must answer:

1. What problem does this solve that isn't already solved?
2. What is the token cost or latency cost? (Measure if you can.)
3. Who benefits? (Primary: solo indie; secondary: small-team engineers.)
4. Why is this better than documenting the pattern in `CLAUDE.md`?

PRs/issues that can't answer these are likely to be closed with a pointer to existing content.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve this? Why is this the best option?

## Additional context

Examples, references, related issues. Avoid naming external projects by name — describe the pattern instead.
